title: Rocket Creeper
description: Adds Rocket Creeper from Primitive Mobs mod.
body: Adds a new type of creeper: Rocket Creeper. This hostile mob acts almost the same as the original creeper but when you get too close it will launch itself and explodes upon impact, when it doesn't have space above to launch it will simply explode. Rocket Creeper is also compatible with [OpenBlocks Trophies](https://modrinth.com/mod/openblocks-trophies) and [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap). This project is in no way associated to the [Primitive Mobs Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/primitive-mobs). All the credit for the texture and the mechanics goes to the original creator Daveyx0. The mod was created in Mcreator by me (Hallowed103).
